'''kayusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psarolepid|psarolepid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psarolepid|psarolepid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kayusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæyisith|kæyisith]] || [[word:kæyisij|kæyisij]] || [[word:kæyisish|kæyisish]] || [[word:kæyisi|kæyisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayuyusuth|kayuyusuth]] || [[word:kayuyusuj|kayuyusuj]] || [[word:kayuyusush|kayuyusush]] || [[word:kayuyusu|kayuyusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayusuth|kayusuth]] || [[word:kayusuj|kayusuj]] || [[word:kayusush|kayusush]] || [[word:kayusu|kayusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayufsuth|kayufsuth]] || [[word:kayufsuj|kayufsuj]] || [[word:kayufsush|kayufsush]] || [[word:kayufsuf|kayufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kayusuthu|kayusuthu]] || [[word:kayusuju|kayusuju]] || [[word:kayusushu|kayusushu]] || [[word:kayusuku|kayusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kayusuth|kayusuth]] || [[word:kayusuj|kayusuj]] || [[word:kayusush|kayusush]] || [[word:kayusu|kayusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kayusuthul|kayusuthul]] || [[word:kayusujul|kayusujul]] || [[word:kayusushul|kayusushul]] || [[word:kayusukul|kayusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kayusuthuthu|kayusuthuthu]] || [[word:kayusujuju|kayusujuju]] || [[word:kayusushushu|kayusushushu]] || [[word:kayusuku|kayusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kayusuthun|kayusuthun]] || [[word:kayusujun|kayusujun]] || [[word:kayusushun|kayusushun]] || [[word:kayusukun|kayusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kayusuthuoro|kayusuthuoro]] || [[word:kayusujuoro|kayusujuoro]] || [[word:kayusushuoro|kayusushuoro]] || [[word:kayusukuoro|kayusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
